CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Harmsco Inc.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HARMSCO INC.

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment. The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. Accordingly the motion is granted and the parties may submit the proposed judgment for signature. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Not argued/contested. The matter is discussed. At conclusion of discussion, the subject matter is continued to Apr-28-2026. Counsel for Plaintiff is to file a supplemental declaration as discussed on the record.
